visual_base.visual_narrative_log: (1) A young woman wearing a beige bucket hat and a white dress stands in front of a refrigerated food display at a Costco warehouse. She enthusiastically holds a large pre-packaged container of mutton hot pot towards the camera, smiling with wide eyes. (2) The camera performs a close-up of the price tag on the shelf showing 289 dollars per kilogram, then focuses on the product label. The woman's hands point out the different ingredients visible through the clear plastic lid, including raw sliced meat and white radish. (3) The scene transitions to a home setting where the same woman and a female friend sit at a dining table. They display various components of the meal kit, such as plastic bags containing clams and sauce packets, holding them up for close inspection. (4) A series of cooking shots shows a blue cast-iron pot on a kitchen stove. Hands use tongs to stir white radish and cabbage in a boiling broth, then add frozen mutton slices and fresh clams. Steam rises from the bubbling pot. (5) The two women are shown sitting in their living room eating the finished meal. They use chopsticks to lift food from their bowls, giving thumbs-up gestures and nodding at the camera with expressions of satisfaction.
visual_base.text_narrative_log: (1) [Logo]: COSTCO WHOLESALE. [Variety]: 超火新品. [Slogan]: 蔬菜羊肉爐. (2) [Subtitle]: 蔬菜羊肉爐. [Logo]: $ 289/KG. (3) [Slogan]: 155000 蔬菜羊肉爐 VEGETABLE MUTTON HOT POT $ 289/KG. (4) [Variety]: 非常醜喔. (5) [Variety]: 超級無敵清香. (6) [Variety]: 畫龍點睛.

visual_human_presence.countingEvidence: 2 female creators appearing in the home dining scene.
visual_human_presence.mainCharacterDescription: One woman wears a beige bucket hat and a white sleeveless dress; the other woman has long dark hair and wears a light blue top.

visual_scene_and_style.backgroundDescribe: The initial scene is at a Costco warehouse with refrigerated shelves and price tags. The subsequent scenes are in a modern apartment with a dining table, a kitchen with a stovetop, and a living room with pillows and plush toys in the background.

audio_base.audio_narrative_log: (1) Upbeat and high-energy electronic pop music starts immediately. An enthusiastic male narrator begins speaking in Mandarin with a bright, professional tone. A subtle 'ding' sound effect highlights the text on screen. The narrator's speech is fast-paced, matching the rhythmic beat of the music. (2) As the camera focuses on the ingredients, a distinct sound of plastic rustling is heard when a bag is moved. A 'whoosh' transition effect coincides with the cut to the home environment. The music maintains its driving energy while the narrator details the quantity of meat slices. (3) During the cooking sequence, a metallic 'click' of tongs hitting the pot is heard, followed by the wet, bubbling sound of soup boiling. A heavy lid is removed with a brief resonance of cast iron. The narrator's voice exhibits high pitch variability to express excitement. (4) In the final tasting phase, the audio contains sounds of slurping and chopsticks clinking against bowls. A burst of female laughter is heard in the background. The music reaches a crescendo with more layered synthesizers and then concludes with a clean fade-out.

narrative_and_purpose.mainPurpose: The video aims to provide a comprehensive review of a specific Costco meal kit (Vegetable Mutton Hot Pot). It attracts viewers by first highlighting the attractive price and convenience at the store, then showing the generous portion sizes at home, and finally validating the quality through a demonstration of the cooking process and enthusiastic eating.

endorsement_analysis.endorsementCues: While focusing on a Costco product, the tone is that of an independent consumer review/vlog rather than a paid advertisement.

high_inference.freeDescribe: The video uses typical social media editing styles with high text density and bright colors to maintain viewer engagement.
